- [Fabric workspace identity](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric/security/workspace-identity)
- [Fabric workspace roles](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric/fundamentals/roles-workspaces)
- [OneLake security](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric/onelake/security/get-started-security)
- [Row-level security](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/relational-databases/security/row-level-security)
- [Column-level security](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/relational-databases/security/column-level-security)

- [Private endpoints](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/private-link/private-endpoint-overview)

## Additional resources

- [Azure Synapse security](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/synapse-analytics/security/) — encryption, RBAC, ACLs, RLS/CLS/DDM, endpoints.
- [Microsoft Purview](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/purview) — Purview lineage, catalog.
- [Azure Synapse security](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/synapse-analytics/security/) — security exercises (RBAC, ACL, DDM, RLS, private endpoints).
- [Row-level security](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/relational-databases/security/row-level-security) · [Dynamic data masking](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/relational-databases/security/dynamic-data-masking) — RLS and DDM T-SQL hands-on.
- [ADLS Gen2 access control model](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/blobs/data-lake-storage-access-control-model) — RBAC vs ACL, endpoints, DDM + RLS/CLS.
